content.title:
Built on Trust. 
Driven by
Precision.
content.subtitle: Why Maxima?
content.paragraph1: At Maxima Concrete, we believe great construction starts with great trust. For over 15 years, we’ve been the concrete contractor in Central Ohio that homeowners and businesses rely on for precision, accountability, and lasting results.
content.paragraph2: From driveways and patios to outdoor living spaces and pools, we handle every step of your project with our own equipment and our own expert team — no middlemen, no outsourcing, and no excuses.

content.title: Below are just a few real reviews from our satisfied customers — proof of our commitment to excellence and care on every job.

reviews.name: J.H — Suburban Home
reviews.text: A wonderful experience! Will definitely be hiring them again in the future for further projects! Just a wonderful job by all involved.

reviews.name: J.S — Grey House
reviews.text: They were professional and impressively hard-working. The high praise from several neighbors probably says all you need to know. Big improvement. It looks great. Problem solved.

reviews.name: A.B — Suburban Home
reviews.text: They did an excellent job on our drive extension. They were on time, efficient, and done in 2 days. I will definitely use them again in the future.

reviews.name: C.L — Suburban Home
reviews.text: I would 100% recommend Maxima Concrete. They are extremely professional and their team does an amazing job. My driveway looks fantastic — if I ever need concrete again, I would most definitely call Maxima Concrete.

content.bottomText: See more great reviews of our company on

content.title:
Financing Options
That Fit Your Budget
benefits: Affordable monthly payments tailored to your budget
Fast approval — see your options in minutes without affecting your credit score
content.bottomText: See your personalized payment options today — simple, secure, and transparent.
content.description: Home improvement shouldn't feel out of reach — that's why Maxima Concrete partners with Hearth Financing to make your project more affordable and stress-free.
content.benefitsTitle: Benefits of Financing with Maxima Concrete:

pillars.title: Transparency
paragraphs: Buying or upgrading concrete work is a major decision. We believe you deserve clarity every step of the way.
That's why we educate you about materials, methods, and what to expect during construction. If any step involves external work — we'll tell you.
You stay informed, empowered, and confident.

pillars.title: Accountability
paragraphs: We don't hide behind contractors — we take ownership.
Because we perform most of the work ourselves, your entire project remains in our hands from start to finish.
Your questions are answered directly by Maxima Concrete, ensuring your experience is smooth and your results are flawless.

pillars.title: Efficiency
paragraphs: With our own licensed team and fleet of equipment, we complete projects faster and with greater consistency.
No waiting for third parties. No scheduling conflicts.
From start to finish, our process is built for precision and productivity — so you get results that last without unnecessary delays.

items.question: How long has Maxima Concrete been in business?
items.answer: We've been a family-owned and operated company since 2011, serving more than 9,000 happy clients across Central Ohio.

items.question: Is Maxima Concrete licensed and insured?
items.answer: Yes. We are licensed, bonded, fully insured, and registered in the cities we work in, and we handle all required permits.

items.question: Do you use subcontractors?
items.answer: No. Every project is completed by our skilled in-house team, ensuring consistent quality and full accountability.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We serve Columbus, Delaware, and surrounding Central Ohio communities across Franklin, Union, Licking, and Fairfield Counties.
